name: Space Container

props.name: background_color
props.title: Background color
props.description: The background color of the container.

props.name: width
props.title: Width
props.description: The width of the container.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Layout wrapper that constrains child content width and applies background colours. Used by organisms to wrap sections. Blueprint: not placed directly — organisms use this internally.

name: Space Flexible Slot

props.name: no_of_columns
props.title: Columns
props.description: Number of inline columns: none, one, two, three, four.

props.name: vertical
props.title: Align items
props.description: Vertical alignment: top, center, bottom.

props.name: horizontal
props.title: Justify items
props.description: Horizontal alignment: left, center, right, space-between. Note: space-between only works with col: none.

props.name: direction
props.title: Direction of items
props.description: Place items: Across the page, Down the page.

props.name: gap
props.title: Gap between items
props.description: The space between columns or content.

props.name: wrap
props.title: Wrap
props.description: When using col: none, this will allow components to wrap.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Flexible grid/layout utility for arranging child elements in rows or columns with responsive breakpoints. Blueprint: not placed directly — organisms use this for internal layout.

name: Space Alert
description: A customizable alert component for displaying different types of status messages such as error, warning, or information.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon
props.description: The image used to represent the alert visually (e.g., an icon).

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The heading or title of the alert message.

props.name: content
props.title: Content
props.description: The detailed text or description of the alert.

props.name: variations
props.title: Alert Type
props.description: The type or category of alert (e.g., status, error, or warning).

usage_hint: Dismissible alert banner for success, warning, error, or info messages. Blueprint mapping: use for compliance notices (HIPAA, attorney advertising), cookie consent, or system notifications. Place at page top or within form sections.

name: Space Avatar
description: A customizable avatar component for displaying user profile images with optional image styles, corner styles, and a link.

props.name: image
props.title: Image
props.description: The image used for the avatar (e.g., user profile image).

props.name: full_name
props.title: Full name
props.description: The full name of the profile.

props.name: image_style
props.title: Image style
props.description: The style or size of the avatar image.

props.name: corner_style
props.title: Corner style
props.description: Style for rounded corners on the avatar image.

props.name: variations
props.title: Avatar Type
props.description: Select avatar type (e.g., regular or grouped avatars).

slots.name: link
slots.title: Link
slots.description: An optional link at the bottom of the avatar.

usage_hint: Circular user avatar showing initials or an image. Used inside team cards, testimonials, and user profile sections. Blueprint: composed inside space-people-card or space-team-section components.

name: Space Badge
description: A customizable badge component for displaying labels with varying sizes.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The text or label displayed on the badge.

props.name: size
props.title: Size
props.description: The size of the badge (small, medium, large).

usage_hint: Small visual label or tag for categorisation, status indicators, or feature flags (e.g., 'New', 'Popular', 'Sale'). Blueprint: used inside cards or list items to highlight attributes.

name: Space Button
description: A customizable button with options for icon, text, size, style, and state to fit different interactions.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon
props.description: The image used as an icon within the button.

props.name: text
props.title: Button text
props.description: The text displayed on the button.

props.name: url
props.title: URL
props.description: The action URL that the button links to when clicked.

props.name: variant
props.title: Variants
props.description: The visual style of the button (e.g., primary, secondary).

props.name: size
props.title: Size
props.description: The size of the button (e.g., small, medium, large).

props.name: button_corners
props.title: Corners
props.description: The style of the button corners (e.g., rounded or square).

props.name: button_type
props.title: Type
props.description: The type of button, determining whether it shows only an icon, only text, or both.

props.name: icon_alignment
props.title: Icon alignment
props.description: The alignment of the icon relative to the button text (left or right).

props.name: expanded
props.title: Expanded
props.description: Whether the button should be full width or auto width.

props.name: button_state
props.title: State
props.description: The state of the button (e.g., focused or disabled).

props.name: classes
props.title: Class names
props.description: Custom CSS class names (separate by spaces), applied when custom style is enabled.

usage_hint: Primary interactive element for navigation and form submission. Variants: primary, secondary, tertiary, link. Sizes: small to xlarge. Blueprint mapping: placed inside CTA slots, form actions, or hero content slots. Every CTA section needs at least one button.

name: Space Features
description: A feature component for highlighting key benefits with customizable icons and content.

props.name: content
props.title: Content
props.description: The text or description highlighting the feature or benefit.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon
props.description: The image used as an icon to represent the feature.

usage_hint: Single feature item with icon, title, and description. Blueprint: composed inside feature grids or card layouts to represent individual services, benefits, or capabilities.

name: Space Form
description: A form component for rendering customizable input elements with configurable attributes.

props.name: attributes
props.title: Attributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the input element (e.g., class, id, placeholder).

slots.name: children
slots.title: Children
slots.description: Content slot for rendering additional elements or child components within the form.

usage_hint: Form container wrapping input fields with layout and submission handling. Blueprint: used on contact pages; wraps space-input, space-select, space-textarea components.

name: Space Heading
description: A customizable heading component with configurable text, color, tag, font, and alignment options.

props.name: content
props.title: Heading
props.description: The text displayed in the heading.

props.name: title_color
props.title: Heading color
props.description: The color of the heading text.

props.name: tag_name
props.title: Tag
props.description: The HTML tag to be used for the heading (e.g., h1, h2).

props.name: font
props.title: Font
props.description: The font style for the heading, taken from the token.css file.

props.name: spacing_bottom
props.title: Spacing bottom
props.description: The bottom spacing for the heading.

props.name: align
props.title: Align
props.description: The alignment of the heading (e.g., left, right, center).

props.name: url
props.title: URL
props.description: The URL that the heading links to.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Any additional CSS classes to modify the heading style.

usage_hint: Semantic heading element (h1-h6) with configurable size, weight, and colour. Blueprint: used inside section headings, card titles, and hero banners for typography control.

name: Space Image
description: An image component with customizable corners, captions, and additional styling options.

props.name: image
props.title: Image
props.description: The image file or URL to be displayed.

props.name: corners
props.title: Image corners
props.description: The style of the image corners (e.g., rounded or sharp).

props.name: image_caption
props.title: Caption
props.description: The caption text displayed below the image.

props.name: extra_classes
props.title: Class names
props.description: Custom CSS class names (separated by spaces) applied when custom styling is enabled.

usage_hint: Responsive image element with lazy loading and alt text. Supports various aspect ratios. Blueprint: used inside hero banners, cards, text-media sections, and galleries.

name: Space Form - Input
description: A customizable input field component for form elements, with support for various input types, labels, placeholders, and validation.

props.name: type
props.title: HTML Input Type
props.description: Specifies the type of `<input>` element to display (e.g., text, password, email).

props.name: value
props.title: Input Value
props.description: Specifies the initial value of the input element.

props.name: placeholder
props.title: Placeholder
props.description: Placeholder text that appears when the input field is empty.

props.name: attributes
props.title: Attributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the input element (e.g., class, id, style).

props.name: children
props.title: Children
props.description: Optional additional rendered elements, such as icons or labels, inside the input field.

props.name: label
props.title: Label
props.description: The text label associated with the input field.

props.name: description_text
props.title: Description
props.description: Additional description or help text displayed below the input field.

props.name: label_display
props.title: Label display
props.description: Controls where the label is displayed relative to the input field.

props.name: description_display
props.title: Description display
props.description: Controls where the description text is displayed relative to the input field.

props.name: errors
props.title: Errors
props.description: Error message displayed when the input validation fails.

usage_hint: Text input field for forms — supports text, email, tel, password, number types. Blueprint: composed inside space-form on contact/registration pages.

name: Space Link
description: A customizable link component with options for text, URL, target behavior, and custom styling.

props.name: text
props.title: Link text
props.description: The visible text of the link.

props.name: url
props.title: Url
props.description: The destination URL the link points to.

props.name: title_text
props.title: Title text
props.description: Additional information displayed when hovering over the link (tooltip).

props.name: target
props.title: Target
props.description: Defines where to open the link (e.g., same window, new tab).

props.name: custom_style
props.title: Custom Style
props.description: Enables or disables custom styling for the link.

props.name: extra_classes
props.title: Class names
props.description: Custom class names to apply to the link, used only if custom style is enabled.

usage_hint: Styled anchor element for inline or standalone navigation. Blueprint: used inside content sections, footers, and navigation menus.

name: Space Paragraph
description: A customizable paragraph component with options for text content, alignment, and additional styling.

props.name: content
props.title: Content
props.description: The text content of the paragraph.

props.name: text_alignment
props.title: Text alignment
props.description: Specifies the alignment of the paragraph text (left, right, or center).

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional CSS class names for custom styling.

usage_hint: Rich text block for body copy, descriptions, and formatted content. Blueprint: used inside text sections, cards, and content areas for prose content.

name: Space Form - Select
description: A customizable select input component for form elements, with support for dynamic options and attributes.

props.name: attributes
props.title: Attributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the `<select>` element (e.g., class, id, style).

usage_hint: Dropdown select field for forms — single selection from predefined options. Blueprint: composed inside space-form for fields like 'Subject', 'Department', 'Service type'.

name: Space Social Button
description: A customizable social button component for integrating popular social platforms with an icon, text, and customizable link behavior. Ideal for social logins, sharing buttons, or any social interaction on the site.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon
props.description: The icon image used for the social button.

props.name: text
props.title: Social button text
props.description: The visible text on the social button.

props.name: text_colors
props.title: Text Color
props.description: The color of the button text.

props.name: social_button_link
props.title: Social button link
props.description: The destination URL when the button is clicked.

props.name: background_color
props.title: Background color
props.description: The background color of the social button.

usage_hint: Social media icon button (Facebook, Twitter, LinkedIn, Instagram, etc.). Blueprint: composed inside space-social-links component or footer sections.

name: Space Sticky Jump Link Tag
description: A customizable sticky jump link tag component for easy navigation to specific sections of a page.

props.name: tag
props.title: Tag
props.description: The text displayed within the sticky jump link tag.

usage_hint: Individual tab/tag item for the sticky jump-link navigation. Blueprint: composed inside space-sticky-jump-link; each tag anchors to a content section.

name: Space Form - Textarea
description: A customizable textarea component for forms, with options for resizing, character limits, and placeholder text.

props.name: resizable
props.title: Resizable
props.description: An indicator for whether the text area is resizable.

props.name: value
props.title: Value
props.description: The content or text entered in the text area.

props.name: rows
props.title: Rows
props.description: Specifies the number of visible text lines in the text area.

props.name: cols
props.title: Cols
props.description: Specifies the visible width of the text area in average character widths.

props.name: maxlength
props.title: Max Length
props.description: Specifies the maximum allowed length (in characters) for the text area.

props.name: placeholder
props.title: Placeholder
props.description: A short hint or text that describes the expected value in the text area.

props.name: readonly
props.title: Read Only
props.description: Specifies whether the text area can be modified by the user. If true, the field is read-only.

props.name: disabled
props.title: Disabled
props.description: Disables the text area, preventing user input.

props.name: wrapper_html_tag
props.title: Wrapper HTML tag
props.description: Specifies the HTML tag used for wrapping the text area.

props.name: attributes
props.title: Attributes
props.description: Additional HTML attributes for the wrapping element.

usage_hint: Multi-line text input for forms — used for message, description, or comment fields. Blueprint: composed inside space-form on contact pages.

name: Space Tooltip
description: A customizable tooltip component with options for content, icon, and arrow position.

props.name: icon
props.title: Icon
props.description: The icon that will be displayed within the tooltip.

props.name: title
props.title: Tooltip Title
props.description: The title of the tooltip, usually providing context or a label for the content.

props.name: content
props.title: Content
props.description: The main content or description displayed inside the tooltip.

props.name: arrowposition
props.title: Arrow position
props.description: Defines the position of the arrow relative to the tooltip. Available options allow you to place the arrow in various directions.

usage_hint: Hover-triggered contextual tooltip for additional information on interactive elements. Blueprint: used for explaining form fields, feature icons, or pricing details.

name: Space Video
description: A component for embedding video content with customizable video source and upload options.

props.name: video
props.title: Upload video.
props.description: The video file provided by Drupal. This can be a link to a video file uploaded within the Drupal system.

props.name: src
props.title: Video source.
props.description: The source URL or path to the video. This could be a URL or a file path pointing to the video resource.

usage_hint: Video player embed supporting YouTube, Vimeo, or self-hosted files. Blueprint: used inside hero banners, content sections, or dedicated media pages.

props.name: label
props.title: Accordion title
props.description: Accordion title.

props.name: content
props.title: Accordion content
props.description: Accordion content.

usage_hint: Single expandable accordion panel with a label and content. Blueprint: composed inside space-accordion organisms; maps to one FAQ question-answer pair.

name: Space Accordion with image item

props.name: label
props.title: Accordion title
props.description: Accordion title.

props.name: content
props.title: Accordion content
props.description: Accordion content.

usage_hint: Accordion panel variant designed for use inside accordion-with-image organisms. Blueprint: same as accordion-item but styled for image-paired layouts.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 4 Data
description: A variation of the accordion component featuring a title and content section, designed for layout variation 4, with optional image support if extended.

props.name: label
props.title: Accordion Title
props.description: The clickable heading text that toggles the accordion open or closed.

props.name: content
props.title: Accordion Content
props.description: The detailed content revealed when the accordion is expanded.

usage_hint: Data panel for the obsolete Variation-4 carousel accordion. Blueprint: do not use for new blueprints.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 4 Image
description: A supporting image configuration for the Space Accordion Variation 4, allowing inclusion of a decorative or informative image alongside accordion content.

props.name: image
props.title: Image
props.description: An optional image displayed with the accordion, useful for visual enhancement in variation 4 layouts.

usage_hint: Image panel for the obsolete Variation-4 carousel accordion. Blueprint: do not use for new blueprints.

name: Space Avatar Label Group
usage_hint: Avatar group with a text label (e.g., '+3 more'). Blueprint: used when showing a truncated list of team members or participants.

name: Space Avatar Group

props.name: number_of_avatar
props.title: Number of Avatar
props.description: Number of Avatar to display

usage_hint: Row of stacked avatar circles showing multiple team members or users. Blueprint: used inside team sections or testimonial areas to show multiple contributors.

name: Space Breadcrumb

props.name: items
props.title: Breadcrumb items
props.description: An array of breadcrumb items with text and URL.

usage_hint: Navigation breadcrumb trail showing page hierarchy (Home > Section > Page). Blueprint mapping: place at the top of inner pages for wayfinding. Maps to the site's page hierarchy.

name: Space Code Snippet

props.description: Title

usage_hint: Formatted code block with syntax highlighting. Blueprint: use on documentation, developer-focused, or technical pages.

slots.name: link
slots.title: Button
slots.description: Optional button at the bottom of the card.

usage_hint: Large prominent card with image, title, description, and CTA link. Blueprint mapping: maps to featured content items (hero blog post, primary service, spotlight project). Use in card grids or as standalone featured content.

name: Space Footer logo content

props.name: image
props.title: Image
props.description: Footer logo

props.name: text

usage_hint: Footer section with logo and descriptive text. Blueprint: composed inside the site footer; maps to site name + tagline/mission statement.

name: Space Icon Card

props.name: preheadline

props.name: text
props.title: Description

props.name: extra_classes
props.title: Class names (multiple class names separated by space). Only applied when custom style enabled.

slots.name: after_content
slots.title: After Content
slots.description: An optional slot to add components such as button after content.

usage_hint: Card with prominent image, title, optional description, and link. Blueprint mapping: maps to portfolio items, blog posts, case studies, or gallery entries. Use inside card grids or slider components.

name: Space Logo Grid
description:
The **Space Logo Grid** is a component used to display a collection of 
logos in a structured grid layout. It supports configurable layout options 
(`column-4`, `column-5`, `column-6`) and background color variations 
(`transparent`, `primaryExtraLight`).  

**Inputs:**
- `layout_type`: Defines the grid layout by column count.
- `background_color`: Sets the background style for the grid.

**Slots:**
- `items`: A flexible slot area for adding multiple image components.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Items
slots.description: A flexible slot area for adding one or more **Space Image** components, typically used to display partner, sponsor, or client logos.

usage_hint: Grid/row of partner, client, or certification logos. Blueprint mapping: maps to partner_logos or trust_signals content model. Use on homepage for social proof or on a dedicated partners page.

name: Space Notification

slots.name: link
slots.title: Link
slots.description: An optional button at the bottom of the card.

usage_hint: Prominent site-wide notification bar for announcements, compliance notices, or promotions. Blueprint mapping: use for HIPAA disclaimers, attorney advertising notices, cookie consent, sale announcements. Place at page top.

name: Space Pagination
description: Show pagination to indicate a series of related content exists across multiple pages.

props.name: items
props.title: List of pager items.
props.description: The list is keyed by the following elements (first, previous, next, last, pages) which they have href, attributes, text)

props.name: current
props.title: Current page
props.description: The page number of the current page.

props.name: shapes
props.title: Shapes
props.description: Shapes of pagination items.

props.name: color
props.title: Color
props.description: Color of the pagination.

props.name: type
props.title: Type
props.description: Type of pagination.

props.name: shape
props.title: Shape
props.description: Shape of pagination items.

props.name: ellipses
props.title: Ellipses
props.description: If there are more pages than the quantity allows, then an ellipsis before or after the listed pages may be present. (previous, next)

props.name: attributes
props.title: Title Attributes
props.description: HTML attributes for the pagination element.

usage_hint: Page navigation controls (previous/next/numbered) for paginated content lists. Blueprint: used on blog listing, search results, or portfolio archive pages.

name: Space Section heading
description:
The **Space Section Heading** is a component used to introduce and provide 
context for a section of a webpage. It allows adding a label, a main title, 
and a descriptive text block, with configurable alignment options.  

**Inputs:**
- `title`: Main heading text of the section.
- `label`: A short label or tagline displayed above the title.
- `description`: Supporting text or paragraph that elaborates on the section.
- `alignment`: Controls the layout of the section heading. Options include:
  - `left`: Aligns all content to the left.
  - `center`: Centers the heading and description.
  - `split`: Splits the layout into two columns with the label and title 
    on one side and the description on the other.

**Usage:**
- Provides context and structure for a section or fold on a page.
- Ensures consistency of headings across different patterns or components.

props.name: label
props.title: Label
props.description: The label of the section.

props.name: description
props.title: Description
props.description: The description of the section.

usage_hint: Section heading block with optional pre-heading, title, and description. Blueprint mapping: used inside organism intro slots (team sections, sliders) to introduce a page section. Maps to section title + subtitle.

name: Space Social Link

props.title: Social Media Link

usage_hint: Row of social media icon buttons. Blueprint mapping: maps to the site's social media profiles. Place in footer or contact page.

name: Space Testimonial Card
description:
The **Space Testimonial Card** is a component used to display customer or 
partner testimonials with support for avatar images, name, designation, and 
descriptive text. It offers multiple layout variations and alignment options 
to adapt to different design contexts.  

**Inputs:**
- `image`: Avatar image object (`src`, `alt`, `width`, `height`).
- `person_name`: Name of the person giving the testimonial.
- `text`: Testimonial content or feedback text.
- `designation`: Role, position, or title of the person.
- `card_layout`: Defines the layout style of the card 
  (`large-avatar`, `avatar`, `company-logo-and-avatar`, `login-logo-and-avatar`).
- `alignment`: Controls content alignment (`center`, `simple`).
- `extra_classes`: Additional class names for custom styling (applied only when custom style is enabled).  

**Slots:**
- `company_logo`: A slot for inserting a **Space Image** component, 
  typically used for displaying a company or brand logo alongside the testimonial.

props.name: person_name
props.title: Headline - Name
props.description: The main headline.

props.name: text
props.title: Description
props.description: A long text under the headline.

props.name: designation
props.title: Designation
props.description: A long text under the headline.

slots.title: Branding logo
slots.description: A slot for inserting a **Space Image** component, typically used for displaying a company or brand logo alongside the testimonial.

usage_hint: Standalone testimonial card with star rating, quote, and author info. Blueprint mapping: maps to testimonials content model (quote, author_name, rating). Alternative to people-card-testimony variants.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 1
description: This component provides a visually enhanced accordion interface, ideal for organizing and presenting detailed information in a collapsible format alongside a supporting image or visual element. It's best used when you need to break down complex topics into digestible sections, while also offering a visual cue for each item. Use it on product pages, service descriptions, or FAQ sections where imagery can complement the textual content.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Accordion with image item
slots.description: Add one or more **Accordion with Image Item** components into this slot; each item will render as a collapsible panel inside the accordion.

usage_hint: Accordion paired with a featured image — no section heading, supports left/right icon alignment and optional borders. Most minimal accordion-with-image variant. Best for: sidebar FAQs or secondary reference sections where an image provides visual context. Blueprint mapping: maps to FAQ content model with an accompanying illustration.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 2
description: This component presents a collapsible content area, enhanced with an optional pre-heading and a main title, alongside interactive accordion items. It's an excellent choice for organizing complex information into easily digestible sections, especially when each section benefits from a visual accompaniment. Utilize this component to improve user engagement and information accessibility on pages with detailed content, such as FAQs or feature descriptions.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The title of the section.

props.name: pre_heading
props.title: Pre heading
props.description: The pre heading of the section.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Accordion with image item
slots.description: Add one or more **Accordion with Image Item** components into this slot; each item will render as a collapsible panel inside the accordion.

usage_hint: Accordion with optional pre-heading and main title above the items list, paired with a featured image. Best for: primary FAQ sections or expandable documentation blocks that need a clear section heading. Blueprint mapping: pre_heading = category label, title = section heading; maps to FAQ content model.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 3
description: This component provides a flexible and visually engaging way to present collapsible content alongside relevant imagery, designed for scenarios where each expandable section benefits from a visual cue. It's best used to organize detailed information into easily navigable segments without requiring a specific header for the entire accordion block. Use this on pages like feature showcases or FAQ sections where a clean, image-supported accordion is desired.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Accordion with image item
slots.description: Add one or more **Accordion with Image Item** components into this slot; each item will render as a collapsible panel inside the accordion.

usage_hint: Accordion inside a container wrapper with items in an inner-wrap, paired with an image. Container constraints improve visual hierarchy in busy layouts. Best for: sectioned FAQs within long-form pages or tabbed content blocks. Blueprint mapping: similar to Variation-2 but with tighter layout containment.

name: Space Accordion with image - Variation 4
description: This component is marked as obsolete and should not be used for new development. Historically, it provided a complex layout combining collapsible content sections with corresponding images, designed for multi-slide presentations. It was intended for scenarios requiring a dynamic display of detailed information paired with visuals, but its usage is now deprecated.

props.name: number_of_slides
props.title: Number of Slides
props.description: Number of slides to display

usage_hint: OBSOLETE — carousel-synced accordion using Splide (10 slides max) that syncs accordion content to associated images. Most complex variant with dual-track image/content sync. Should not be used for new blueprints; prefer Variation-1 or Variation-2 instead.

name: Space Accordion
description: This component allows for the display of collapsible content sections, ideal for presenting frequently asked questions, detailed information, or nested content in a compact manner. It helps in organizing large amounts of text by showing only a summary initially, expanding upon user interaction. Use this component to improve content scannability and reduce visual clutter on a page.

slots.name: items
slots.title: Accordion Items
slots.description: Add one or more **Accordion Item** components into this slot; each item will render as a collapsible panel inside the accordion.

usage_hint: Base accordion — expandable/collapsible content panels. Supports icon types (PlusMinus, chevronDown, none), icon alignment (left/right), border styles, and container width (default, half-width, three-quarters-width). Best for: FAQ sections, service details, policy disclosures, or any content that benefits from progressive disclosure. Blueprint mapping: items slot → space-accordion-item components; maps to FAQ content model (question/answer pairs).

name: Space CTA Banner - Type 1
description:
The **Space CTA Banner – Type 1** is a call-to-action banner designed to 
highlight key messages and encourage user interaction. It supports a title, 
description, and flexible content placement for CTAs such as buttons or links.  

**Inputs:**
- `title`: The main heading text of the banner.
- `description`: Supporting text that elaborates on the call-to-action.
- `width`: Defines the banner layout width (`boxed-width`, `full-width`).
- `alignment`: Controls the text alignment (`left-align`, `center-align`).
- `modifier_class`: Allows adding custom CSS classes for style overrides.  

**Slots:**
- `cta_content`: A flexible slot area for inserting one or more 
  **Space Button** components or other call-to-action elements.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The title of the CTA Banner.

props.name: description
props.title: Description
props.description: The description of the CTA Banner.

props.name: width
props.title: CTA Banner width
props.description: Width of CTA Banner.

props.name: alignment
props.title: Alignment
props.description: Alignment of CTA Banner content.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

slots.name: cta_content
slots.title: Content
slots.description: A flexible slot area for inserting one or more **Space Button** components or other call-to-action elements.

usage_hint: Two-column CTA — title and description on the left, CTA button slot on the right. Supports boxed-width or full-width layout and left/centre alignment. No image. Best for: mid-page conversion prompts, newsletter sign-ups, or secondary CTAs between content sections. Blueprint mapping: title = conversion message, description = supporting value proposition; place a space-button in the cta_content slot.

name: Space CTA Banner - Type 2

usage_hint: Stacked CTA — title and description on top, CTA buttons below, with a full-width background image integrated. Has an image_type prop (large-image / small-image) controlling visual weight. Best for: dramatic conversion moments requiring visual impact — e.g., 'Start your free trial' with a product screenshot. Blueprint mapping: choose over Type-1 when an image strengthens the conversion message.

name: Space CTA Banner - Type 3
description: This component renders a compelling call-to-action banner that includes an image, title, and description to effectively guide users toward a specific action. Its customizable width and content alignment make it versatile for various page sections. Use this component to create visually engaging prompts for user engagement, such as sign-ups, downloads, or navigation to other key areas.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: The title of the CTA Banner.

props.description: Width of CTA Banner.

props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Stacked CTA — title, description, and image above, with CTA buttons positioned outside the main container below. Differs from Type-2 by separating the CTA from the banner body for emphasis. Best for: image-forward CTAs with sequential visual flow — e.g., showcase then convert. Blueprint mapping: use when the call-to-action needs visual separation from the content above.

name: Space Hero Banner Style 01
description: This component renders a large, prominent hero section, typically used at the top of a page to make a strong first impression. It combines a full-width background image with a title and sub-headline to immediately convey a key message. Use this component on landing pages or as an introductory banner for important sections to visually engage the user.

usage_hint: Full-width background-image hero with centered title and sub-headline. Has a form slot for email capture / lead-gen and an info-items slot for short stat highlights. Best for: homepage or campaign landing pages where you want a striking visual backdrop plus an inline lead form. Blueprint mapping: maps to the site's primary entry point; populate title from site name/tagline, sub_headline from elevator pitch.

name: Space Hero Banner Style 02
description: This component renders a prominent hero banner, designed for the top of a page to create a strong initial impact. It integrates a background image with a main title and sub-headline, effectively communicating a key message to the user. Use this component to introduce a page or section, drawing attention to its core purpose or offering.

usage_hint: Full-width background-image hero with centered title, sub-headline, form slot, and info-items slot. Similar to Style-01 but applies mx-auto centering for a more balanced visual hierarchy. Best for: homepage hero or primary landing page when centre-aligned symmetry is preferred. Blueprint mapping: same content model as Style-01; choose this when the design calls for centred balance rather than left-aligned impact.

name: Space Hero Banner Style 03
description: This component provides a comprehensive hero banner, ideal for introducing a page or a major section with rich content. It features a prominent image alongside a main title, a sub-headline, and a detailed description, allowing for a strong visual and informational impact. Use this component to capture user attention and convey core messages effectively at the top of a landing page or significant content area.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: title

usage_hint: Split-layout hero — tall featured image on the left (50 %) with title, sub-headline, description paragraph, and CTA slot on the right. Unique among hero variants for having a full description prop. Best for: about pages, case-study intros, or feature showcases where you need narrative prose alongside imagery. Blueprint mapping: populate description from the page's introductory copy; use CTA slot for primary page action (e.g., 'Learn More', 'Book Consultation').

Best for: bold campaign announcements, event pages, or brand-forward sections. Blueprint mapping: title should be short and punchy (works best ≤ 5 words); image is secondary to the typographic impact.

Only hero with the description text in a separate column from the title. Best for: conceptual/messaging-forward introductions, manifesto-style pages. Blueprint mapping: title = bold statement; right column provides the narrative context and call-to-action.

name: Space Hero Banner Style 10
description:
The **Space Hero Banner Style 10** is a full-width hero section component 
designed for high-impact landing pages. It supports two background or 
foreground images (`image_1` and `image_2`), a primary title, and a 
sub-headline.  

This component is typically used at the top of a page to highlight key 
messaging or brand identity, combining large visuals with text.  

**Inputs:**
- `image_1`: Main hero image (object with `src` and `alt`).
- `image_2`: Secondary hero image (object with `src` and `alt`).
- `title`: Main headline text.
- `sub_headline`: Supporting text or tagline.

**Slots:**
- `actions`: A flexible slot area that allows inserting one or more 
  **Space Button** components or other call-to-action elements.  
  Commonly used for primary/secondary CTAs such as "Get Started", 
  "Learn More", or "Contact Us".

**Usage:**
- Use when you need a visually engaging banner with dual imagery.
- Works best for hero sections, landing pages, or campaign intros.
- Place one or multiple call-to-action buttons inside the `actions` slot.
- Ensures accessibility with `alt` text for images.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: title

usage_hint: Complex triple-column layout — small accent image on the far left (≈ 20 %), large title and sub-headline in the centre (≈ 60 %), and a medium featured image on the right (≈ 40 %). Unique for coordinating two distinct images. Best for: sophisticated multi-image hero showcases, creative agencies, or portfolio sites. Blueprint mapping: use when the page needs two complementary images (e.g., team + workspace, product + lifestyle).

name: Space Hero Banner Style 11
description: This component renders a prominent hero banner, featuring a compelling image alongside a main title and a sub-headline. It is designed to make a strong visual and informational impact at the top of a page. Utilize this component to introduce a key section or a landing page, drawing user attention and effectively communicating a central message.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: title

usage_hint: Split layout — text on the left (≈ 60 %) and image on the right (≈ 40 %) with a gradient background overlay (white-to-light-primary). Best for: premium/branded landing pages where the gradient adds visual depth. Blueprint mapping: similar content model to Style-05 but choose this when the brand's primary colour should subtly backdrop the hero.

name: Space Team Section Image Card 1
description: This component is designed to showcase a team or group of individuals, featuring an introductory section, individual team member profiles, and associated links. It provides a structured way to present team information, allowing for visual emphasis on each member. Use this component to introduce your organization's team, project contributors, or key personnel on 'About Us' pages or dedicated team sections.

slots.name: intro_section

usage_hint: Visual-heavy team showcase — centred intro, centred links, team members displayed as large image cards with bio overlay. Largest image footprint among team variants. Best for: creative agencies, photography studios, or personality-driven brands. Blueprint mapping: maps to team_members; requires high-quality team photos. Slot: team_member → space-people-card-people-with-image-bio.

name: Space Team Section Image Card 2
description: This component is designed to present a team or group of individuals in an organized and visually appealing manner, including an introductory section, individual team member profiles, and optional associated links. It offers background color customization for aesthetic flexibility. Use this component to effectively showcase your organization's team members on 'About Us' pages, project pages, or dedicated team sections to build trust and provide context.

usage_hint: Full-width team showcase — intro/links section, team members with image + bio cards extending full-bleed. Most immersive team variant. Best for: dedicated 'Meet the Team' pages or partner showcases. Blueprint mapping: maps to team_members with full bios; images break container boundaries for visual drama.

name: Space Team Section Simple 1
description: This component is designed to showcase a team or group of individuals in a straightforward manner, featuring an introductory section and individual team member profiles. It provides a clean and structured way to present team information, with an optional background color for visual distinction. Use this component to introduce your organization's team or project contributors on 'About Us' pages or dedicated team sections.

usage_hint: Minimal team display — intro section heading slot above, team member cards below (avatar-only, no images). Compact visual footprint. Best for: quick staff rosters, advisor lists, or footer-area team mentions. Blueprint mapping: maps to team_members content model; use when the page needs a lightweight team presence. Slot: intro_section → space-section-heading; team_member → space-people-card-people-with-avatar.

name: Space Team Section Simple 2
description: This component is designed to showcase a team or group of individuals in a straightforward and minimalist fashion. It includes an introductory section and individual team member profiles, with an optional background color. It's ideal for presenting a team on \"About Us\" pages or dedicated team sections where a clean and direct presentation is preferred.

Blueprint mapping: maps to team_members with bio field populated. Differs from Simple-1 by adding biography context alongside avatars.

usage_hint: Full-width team layout with intro section (including navigation links) above, team members with avatar and bio below. Best for: dedicated team pages with department filtering or role links. Blueprint mapping: maps to team_members; use the links slot for department/role navigation. Unique for positioning links inline with intro.

name: Space Text and Media - Default
description: This component allows for the flexible presentation of content by pairing descriptive text (title and description) with a single image. It offers various layout configurations, enabling control over the image and text alignment and their relative column widths. Use this component to effectively explain concepts, showcase features, or detail services where a visual element enhances understanding and engagement.

props.name: title
props.title: Title
props.description: title

props.name: alignment_column
props.title: Column alignment
props.description: Set column alignment to default(Left text-Right image), left image(Left image-Right text) or stack etc.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Two-column layout — title and description text on one side, single featured image on the other. The baseline text-to-image ratio for feature pages. Best for: about sections, service descriptions, mission statements, or any narrative paired with a supporting image. Blueprint mapping: title = section heading, description = body copy; image illustrates the topic.

name: Space Text and Media - With Checklist
description:
The **Space Text and Media – With Checklist** is a content-focused section 
that combines text, imagery, and checklist-style highlights in a flexible 
two-column layout. It is designed to showcase key messages with supporting 
visuals while offering multiple layout and style variations.  

**Inputs:**
- `title`: Main heading text of the section.
- `image_1`: Image object (`src`, `alt`) displayed alongside the text.
- `description`: Rich text content for the section.
- `alignment_column`: Controls the arrangement of text and image.
  - `default`: Left text, right image.
  - `leftimage`: Left image, right text.
  - `stack`: Stacks text and image vertically.
- `out_of_box`: Toggles whether the section breaks out of the normal content 
  container (`on` / `off`).
- `column_width`: Sets the column width ratio (`50-50`, `34-66`, `25-75`, 
  `66-34`, `75-25`).
- `modifier_class`: Allows adding custom CSS classes for styling overrides.  

**Slots:**
- `checklist_items`: A flexible slot area for adding one or more checklist 
  items, typically implemented using the **Space Checklist Item** component.

props.description: title

props.title: Column alignment
props.description: Set column alignment to default(Left text-Right image), left image(Left image-Right text) or stack etc.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Two-column layout — title, description, and bulleted checklist on one side, image on the other. Best for: feature lists, process steps, benefits breakdowns, or requirements documentation. Blueprint mapping: title = section heading, description = context, checklist items = discrete features or steps. Maps to services or features content model.

name: Space Text and Media - With Images
description: This component provides a flexible layout for presenting content, focusing on pairing two distinct images within a structured layout. It offers various layout configurations, enabling control over the image placement and their relative column widths. Use this component to create visually engaging sections that require two images to convey a message, such as comparisons or showcases, often used in conjunction with a separate text block for comprehensive information.

props.name: alignment_column
props.title: Column alignment
props.description: Set column alignment to default(Left text-Right image), left image(Left image-Right text) or stack etc.

props.name: modifier_class
props.title: Modifier class
props.description: Additional classes.

usage_hint: Two-column layout with images on BOTH sides — no text content, purely visual. Best for: visual comparisons, before/after showcases, image galleries, or portfolio highlights. Blueprint mapping: use when the section's message is conveyed through imagery alone (e.g., project photos, product angles).

name: Space Text and Media - With link
description: This component provides a flexible layout for presenting content, combining a title, descriptive text, and up to two images, along with an interactive link or call-to-action. It offers various layout configurations for image and text alignment and column widths. Use this component to explain concepts, showcase features, or drive user action where both visual context and direct interaction are important.

slots.name: content
slots.title: Content
slots.description: Add one or more **Button** components into this slot.

usage_hint: Two-column layout — title, description, and link/button slot on one side, image on the other. Best for: feature introductions with a primary action, blog previews with 'Read More', or service teasers. Blueprint mapping: similar to default but adds a CTA link; use when the section needs a clear next-step action.

name: Space Text and Media - With Stats
description: This component offers a versatile layout for presenting content, effectively combining a title, descriptive text, and an image with an integrated section for statistics or key performance indicators (KPIs). It provides flexibility in layout and column width, making it ideal for showcasing data-backed information alongside explanatory text. Use this component to present features, benefits, or achievements that are supported by quantitative metrics.

usage_hint: Two-column layout — title, description, and 2-column stats/KPI grid on one side, image on the other. Best for: metrics-driven narratives, case-study results, company milestones, or performance highlights. Blueprint mapping: stats map to stats_kpi content model (value + label pairs); image provides visual context.
